name: sistema-facturacion-root
description: Root package for building and deploying both frontend and backend

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.copy:frontend: mkdir backend\public 2>nul || ver>nul && xcopy frontend\dist backend\public /E /I /Y
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run copy:frontend
scripts.deploy:prepare: npm run install:all && npm run build
